fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the item ledger entry, for which the item application entry was recorded.

fields.name: Inbound Item Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry corresponding to the inventory increase or positive quantity in inventory for this entry.

fields.name: Outbound Item Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry corresponding to the inventory decrease for this entry.

fields.name: Primary Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a unique identifying number for each item application entry history record.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item quantity being applied from the inventory decrease in the Outbound Item Entry No. field, to the inventory increase in the Inbound Item Entry No. field.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date that corresponds to the posting date of the item ledger entry, for which this item application entry was created.

fields.name: Transferred-from Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item ledger entry number of the inventory increase, if an item application entry originates from an item location transfer.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which this entry in the item application entry was originally created in the Item Application Entry window.

fields.name: Created By User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the user who originally posted the transaction that created this item application entry in the Item Application Entry table.

fields.name: Last Modified Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which this item application entry was last changed. The item application is modified when the outbound transaction is applied to the inbound transaction.

fields.name: Last Modified By User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the user who last changed this item application entry. The item application is modified when the outbound transaction is applied to the inbound transaction.

fields.name: Deleted Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the current date when the user removes the application specified in this entry.

fields.name: Deleted By User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the user who removes the application specified in this entry .

fields.name: Cost Application
fields.tooltip: Specifies which application entries should have the cost forwarded, or simply included, in an average cost calculation.

fields.name: Output Completely Invd. Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the outbound item entries have been completely invoiced.
